forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 53. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 64, with temperatures falling to around 62 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 7 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

weather_report:
As dawn unfurls its gentle light over Downtown San Francisco, the city stirs under a mostly cloudy sky, with the specter of fog partially shrouding the Golden Gate Bridge. The air, cool and crisp at around 53 degrees, carries the whisper of a southwest wind, adding a fresh touch to the atmosphere. With the promise of a mostly sunny Saturday unfolding, the day is destined to bloom into a delightful canvas filled with soft sunlight and temperatures that will gracefully taper to around 62 by afternoon. 

Dress in layers today; a light jacket will serve well against the cool breeze in the early hours, yet you may loosen up as the sun breaks through, inviting a casual stroll along the Embarcadero or a quiet moment in one of the city’s charming parks. It is an ideal day for leisurely exploration, where a visit to a local café might tantalize your taste buds or a walk through the vibrant streets could lighten your spirit. As the marine layer ebbs and flows, those gorgeous glimpses of blue sky will remind you that in this city, charm often lies in the unexpected.
